Hoolheyak:Bibliotheca.NAME: "Bibliotheca"
Hoolheyak:Bibliotheca.FLAVOR: Memories are like a library, though obviously, the collection size of each library varies.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of combat, gain #b2 Analysis.

Hoolheyak:FrenziedSundial.NAME: Frenzied Sundial
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your turn, gain [E] and enter a random #yAspect.

Hoolheyak:StarMapProjection.NAME: Star Map Projection
Hoolheyak:StarMapProjection.FLAVOR: For many, the initial reason for getting into astrology is simply curiosity about their time of death.
DESCRIPTIONS: Most #yVariables can cost an additional [E] to trigger all effects simultaneously.

Hoolheyak:OldNotes.NAME: Old Notes
Hoolheyak:OldNotes.FLAVOR: It records many precious documents. As for how they were collected...
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you draw #b5 Attack cards, gain #b1 #yErudition; whenever you draw #b5 Skill cards, gain #b1 #yMeander.

Hoolheyak:TimeMuseum.NAME: Time Gallery of K'uk'ulkan
Hoolheyak:TimeMuseum.FLAVOR: Fools build high walls, philosophers tear them down, and vice versa... History is a fascinating database, inevitably hiding revelations for the future. After all, history was once the future for countless generations.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first time you play each type of card each combat, play it #b1 additional time.

Hoolheyak:CocktailShaker.NAME: Cocktail Shaker
DESCRIPTIONS: Upon pickup, Max HP + #b3. Whenever you play #b1 card of a different color, heal #b1 HP.

Hoolheyak:TailCareKit.NAME: Tail Care Kit
Hoolheyak:TailCareKit.FLAVOR: "Are you team thick tail or team thin tail?"
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of combat, apply #b7 #yDeconstruction to all enemies.

Hoolheyak:BeautifulHistoryBook.NAME: Beautifully Bound History Book
Hoolheyak:BeautifulHistoryBook.FLAVOR: The same trick won't work twice on a smart person.
DESCRIPTIONS: Enemies defeated previously in this run lose #b50% of their Max HP at the start of combat. NL (Right-click to view the list.)

Hoolheyak:AstronomicalTelescope.NAME: Astronomical Telescope
Hoolheyak:AstronomicalTelescope.FLAVOR: Those constellations, planets, and trajectories are not commands, but metaphors.
DESCRIPTIONS: Upon pickup, randomly transform #b1 Strike or Defend in your deck into a Colorless card. If you have no basic cards, obtain #b1 random #yRare Colorless card.

Hoolheyak:BottledCloud.NAME: Bottled Cloud
Hoolheyak:BottledCloud.FLAVOR: "Great, now I can double jump even better."

Hoolheyak:WeatherBalloon.NAME: Weather Balloon
Hoolheyak:WeatherBalloon.FLAVOR: "Seeking to rival the heavens in height."
DESCRIPTIONS: When an enemy triggers #yLevitate, gain #b5 additional #yLift.

Hoolheyak:ZodiacModel.NAME: Zodiac Model
Hoolheyak:ZodiacModel.FLAVOR: Feathers dampened by forest dew, tail sweeping past ruined stone pillars, knowledge is passed down through generations.
DESCRIPTIONS: When an enemy's intent is different from the previous turn, apply #b2 #yLift to them.

Hoolheyak:StarryRevelation.NAME: Galleria Stellaria's Splendor
Hoolheyak:StarryRevelation.FLAVOR: Trimounts' firmament has been restored to its original state, but surely no one can forget the sight after it was torn open.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of Elite or Boss combats, apply #yLift to all enemies equal to half their #yGravity.

Hoolheyak:PureWaterSpriteAssist.NAME: Pure Water Elf's Assistance
Hoolheyak:PureWaterSpriteAssist.FLAVOR: "Let's be clear beforehand, just this once."
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of combat, summon #b1 Flowing Shape with #b16 HP. Enemies are forced to attack the Fluid Form while it is alive. #b3 turns after the Fluid Form dies, it resurrects with full HP.

Hoolheyak:EyesOfPriestess.NAME: Eyes of the Priestess
Hoolheyak:EyesOfPriestess.FLAVOR: Entering your dreams, shaping your dreams.
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you draw cards at the start of your turn after shuffling your deck, look at the top #b5 cards of your draw pile and select up to #b5 cards. Variable: #yDiscard them ; #yPlace them at the bottom of your draw pile.
